segments.text: Setting up that down smash with long active frames!
segments.original_text: これは持続が長い下スマッシュを置いていきます

segments.text: That counts as a smash attack!
segments.original_text: これじゃこっちがスマッシュだって

full_text: Setting up that down smash with long active frames! Off the jump getup! That counts as a smash attack! Why?!
